steps.title: Turn the equation into a calculator check
steps.content: Instead of substituting every choice by hand, solve once for $y$: $7x-4y=-84$ becomes $y=\frac{84+7x}{4}$. Then evaluate that rule at the $x$-values shown in the answer tables.

steps.title: Use a Desmos list evaluation
steps.content: In Desmos, enter the likely $x$-row as $x_1=[0,4,8]$, then enter $y_1=\frac{84+7x_1}{4}$. Desmos returns the output list $[21,28,35]$.

steps.title: Match the table
steps.content: The corresponding pairs are $(0,21)$, $(4,28)$, and $(8,35)$. Those are exactly the entries in choice A.
